{{Infobox character
| name = Vorus Belfry
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vorus Belfry]] is [[Artur]]'s brother and the [[Silent One]].}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vorus]] is a tutor for [[Calder]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
